meta.meta_description:
El Ponce offers delicious traditional Mexican food in a fun and friendly 
environment. We are located at 939 Ponce de Leon Ave in Atlanta, GA down 
the street from Ponce City Market and the Beltline. We have a great outdoor 
dog friendly patio and excellent margaritas. Come on by. #friendsAreHere
